_comment: Copy to ~/.echo/config.json and fill in. Only needed for Mac DESKTOP-APP call recording. Browser calls are configured in the extension Options page instead.
_audio_help: ffmpeg avfoundation audio device. Run: ffmpeg -f avfoundation -list_devices true -i ""  then put the audio device number as ":N". For system audio you need a loopback device like BlackHole (brew install blackhole-2ch) and an Aggregate/Multi-Output device.
